zh.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart於1555年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Margaret至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1628年2月2日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart于1555年出生在英国英格兰。他和Margaret至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1628年2月2日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

variants.name: Pert
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Peart  .

variants.name: Peard
meanings: English (Devon): perhaps a variant of Peart with voicing of final -d.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart was born in 1555, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret. He died on 2 February 1628, in Alstone, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart est né en 1555, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret. Il est décédé le 2 février 1628, à Alstone, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart wurde 1555 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1628 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Alstone, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart è nato il nel 1555 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret. Morì il 2 febbraio 1628, nel Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Peartは1555年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼はMargaretとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1628年2月2日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルストーンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart(은)는 1555년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 Margaret(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1628년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 알스톤에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart nasceu em 1555, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1628, em Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart родился в 1555 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret. Он умер 2 февраля 1628 г. в местности алстоун, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Stephen Peart nació en 1555, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1628, en Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
